description_long: This is a plastic beverage bottle with a contoured shape and a red screw cap. The bottle features a prominent red label wrapped around its midsection, displaying the Coca-Cola logo and additional product information in white text. The main body of the bottle is translucent, revealing a pale yellow liquid inside, and has a textured grip area with raised dots and the Coca-Cola script molded into the plastic. The cap is ribbed for easy gripping and removal. The label includes nutritional information, a barcode, and branding elements, all printed in white on the red background. The overall design is ergonomic and visually distinctive, making it easily recognizable as a Coca-Cola product.
description: A contoured, translucent plastic Coca-Cola bottle with a red screw cap and a red label, containing a pale yellow liquid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Coca-Cola logo and 'Sabor Original' text on the red label, with the bottle's contoured shape and yellowish liquid visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the barcode, recycling symbols, and additional product information on the label, with the cap and bottle shape clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the nutritional information and fine print on the label, with the bottle's grip texture and liquid content visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more detailed product information and branding on the label, as well as the molded Coca-Cola script on the bottle.
attribute_label_or_branding: Red label with white Coca-Cola logo, 'Sabor Original' text, barcode, nutritional information, and product details in white; branding is prominent and wraps around the bottle.
